user.title: Teslemetry Entities
user.description: Select the Teslemetry entities for your Tesla Powerwall.

data_description.teslemetry_operation_mode: Select entity that controls Powerwall mode (self_consumption, backup, etc.)
data_description.teslemetry_backup_reserve: Select entity that sets backup reserve percentage
data_description.teslemetry_soc: Sensor showing current battery state of charge
data_description.teslemetry_grid_power: Sensor showing grid power flow (positive=import, negative=export)

pricing.title: Pricing Entities
pricing.description: Select the pricing entities (e.g., from Amber Electric or Octopus Energy).

data_description.pricing_general_forecast: Forecast sensor with upcoming buy prices
data_description.pricing_feed_in_forecast: Forecast sensor with upcoming sell prices
data_description.pricing_price_spike: Binary sensor indicating price spike events

solcast.title: Solcast & Notifications
solcast.description: Select the Solcast forecast entities and notification service.

data_description.solcast_forecast_today: Solcast forecast for today's solar production
data_description.solcast_forecast_tomorrow: Solcast forecast for tomorrow's solar production
data_description.sun_entity: Sun entity for sunrise/sunset times (usually sun.sun)

init.title: LocalShift Settings
init.description: Configure demand window timing, price thresholds, and battery settings.

data_description.demand_window_start: Time when demand window begins (battery held for evening peak)
data_description.demand_window_end: Time when demand window ends (normal operation resumes)
data_description.manual_override_timeout: Hours before manual mode automatically returns to self-consumption (0 = never)
data_description.cheap_price_percentile: Price percentile threshold for grid charging (e.g., 25 = charge when price is in bottom 25%)
data_description.max_pre_charge_price: Maximum price ($/kWh) to pay for pre-charging battery
data_description.cheap_price_deadband: Minimum price difference ($/kWh) to start/stop charging (prevents rapid cycling)
data_description.spike_price_percentile: Price percentile for spike discharge (e.g., 75 = discharge at top 25% prices)
data_description.battery_target: Target SOC % for demand window (battery reserved for evening peak)
data_description.minimum_target_soc: Minimum SOC % maintained during discharge modes (spike, proactive export)
data_description.load_weight_recent: Weight given to recent load vs historical average (0.67 = 2/3 recent, 1/3 historical)
data_description.export_price_margin: Minimum profit margin ($/kWh) for battery export when grid import needed to replace

cheap_price_percentile.name: Cheap Price Percentile
cheap_price_percentile.description: Price percentile threshold for grid charging (e.g., 25 = charge when price is in bottom 25%)

max_pre_charge_price.name: Max Pre-charge Price
max_pre_charge_price.description: Maximum price ($/kWh) to pay for pre-charging battery

cheap_price_deadband.name: Price Deadband
cheap_price_deadband.description: Minimum price difference ($/kWh) to start/stop charging (prevents rapid cycling)

forecast_lookahead_hours.name: Forecast Lookahead
forecast_lookahead_hours.description: Hours ahead to scan for price spikes and cheap periods

battery_target.name: Battery Target
battery_target.description: Target SOC % for demand window (battery reserved for evening peak)

load_weight_recent.name: Recent Load Weight
load_weight_recent.description: Weight given to recent load vs historical average (0.67 = 2/3 recent, 1/3 historical)

spike_price_percentile.name: Spike Price Percentile
spike_price_percentile.description: Price percentile for spike discharge (e.g., 75 = discharge at top 25% prices)

minimum_target_soc.name: Minimum Target SOC
minimum_target_soc.description: Minimum SOC % maintained during discharge modes (spike, proactive export)

automation_enabled.name: Automation Enabled
automation_enabled.description: Master toggle for all LocalShift automation

spike_discharge_enabled.name: Spike Discharge Enabled
spike_discharge_enabled.description: Allow battery discharge during price spike events

spike_discharge_conservative.name: Conservative Spike Discharge
spike_discharge_conservative.description: Reserve extra SOC during spike discharge for demand window

dry_run.name: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Simulate mode changes without actually controlling Powerwall

demand_window_block.name: Demand Window Block
demand_window_block.description: Block grid imports during evening demand window (hold battery for peak)

allow_dw_entry_under_target.name: Allow Early DW Entry
allow_dw_entry_under_target.description: Allow entering demand window below target if solar forecast can reach target during window
